notes:
The game doesn't launch at all. Steam shows the game as running for a while then it stops. I tried adding PROTON_LOG=1 in launch options to see the logs. There is no meaningful description related to the issue. It's probably some issue related with Unity or game's code. 

I've tried running the game with this command in a terminal (also tried non-wine32):
> WINEPREFIX=$HOME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/3241660/pfx wine32 $HOME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/REPO/REPO.exe

I was able to see a black window coming up. It showed a split second of glitching effect (probably game's intro) then the window quit and process exited. I thought maybe something related with window management is causing errors, I also tried with gamemoderun and gamescope but no luck again.

I also tried to re-installing the game and deleting .local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/3241660/pfx and other REPO related game files while switching settings but no luck. I tried: Proton Experimental, Proton Hotfix, Proton 9.0-4, GE-Proton9-27
title: R.E.P.O.
